h731c3aa9g0aceg4906ga37ag63527da8f885: Have you come to your senses?
haec2fbabgc0a8g49abg9e77g468a3c898aa1: I'd like you to join my party.
hc17b859eg7589g4f15g9783gc440f9476003: Go to my camp. We can speak there.
h613526f2g2d83g4d48g841bgc65a4d5626f1: Shka'keth! I have followed protocol. He does not speak for Vlaakith!
h9372bfecg3919g4a28g954dg483d0bc04ab2: I would like you to continue your journey with me.
hff528e7dgc62eg4516g9c2ag1f137db01706: Shka'keth! I have followed protocol. He does not speak for Vlaakith!
hf0b48d3agc05bg47bdgaaf7gced1ff071ac1: I will be pure. I will join my Queen!
hae13b88bg845eg472dga072gcce17b23f491: And you. Of course. Even death cannot sever our alliance, it would seem.
h78055f07gaa6ag4508g9231g79c5e27c7656: What just happened? Our kin are out for blood, it seems.
hdef12184g2b7ag4fe1g8bcag661faa924cf7: What just happened? Your own is out for blood.
h6ff9b427g6f47g4534g9253g5fa7efbf589c: The box suddenly seems to weigh heavily on you. Quickly turn to other matters.
heb156a4bg1635g40c3gb4efg548b3e723f93: ... you survived longer than I expected without me to aid you.
h549e3ef2g4900g4d7cg908cg25f4ba4bcb93: It is time you finally lend me your skills. We may locate this crèche together, and be purified.
hf4386b12gd4a1g44afgb4a9g2b2a2327e0f1: *Your skull briefly aches, and you are her. You feel the woman's anger at the kith'rak she'd confronted.*
h4edc6deegdd9fg4b5cg8f74g1ae0d9ccac35: *Your skull briefly aches, and you are her. You feel the woman's anger at the dragon-rider she'd confronted.*
hc4a6b9a6g3c19g41bag9f61g36c4fc190790: *You also feel answers. She knows more about your condition.*
h93e3bd65g2decg4e41g87e8gd6ec19351d8d: You left me for dead. I've killed my own cousins for considerably less.
h918f1feag1d42g4114ga044g41fe2fd9b4be: *You note the look in her eye, the slight tilt of her head. She is sizing you up.*
h3c388c61g024dg4e3eg9779g32235ebb5ca4: Yet even a feared kith'rak could not break your spirit. Yes - you may be of considerable use.
hbbc60a74gbd07g467ag82bbgc2899dd0a0fc: I know of a cure. Lend me your skills, and I will take you to it.
h56a04768gedb4g4fafgb2bfg45a8c96fdb62: Lies. Just get rid of her.
haca6e248g22afg4d01ga2cbg7d86d91d1407: Naturally. I had a mission; they proved a barrier.
h24919ec0g22f9g4b6cg9b03gaba5bb20b4d7: Should briar hinder your path, do you not cut it down?
hb84b8e23g9e07g4c71ga55bg3cf7cb268737: I left you behind, yet you wish to join forces?
he60f2bddg6ea2g4256gaffcge9dea7643b30: You possess a modicum of competence, though it pains me to say so.
h33c65013gea1ag4ca6gb124g203b88a408ce: An alliance is pragmatic - for the time being.
he7628ef5g742eg4b9eg858cg6dde60761cf4: A githyanki crèche must be near; its caretaker has the means to cleanse us.
hba2a2b97g9158g46ffga18ag1faddf9ff4b8: So says our Queen's teachings, and so it must be.
h3368b3c9g5dacg462eg93bbgc1039b65b86c: So says my Queen's teachings, and so it must be.
h295ba68bg33aeg4767g8b41g623197070fb6: A crèche? Do you mean a hatchery?
h9d57c9ccg5f5fg4f9eg837fgace8380ded6c: And what is a crèche, exactly...?
h5c732d62g7d28g43b1gb996ge70bef0efb0c: It is many things. A hatchery, a training grounds, a shelter.
hee73812fg6debg473fga05ag1ef925ca168e: Githyanki protocol is clear: when infected with a ghaik tadpole, we must report to a caretaker for purification.
h3f16c8d9g6a31g484dga6ceg99c640d5b615: One must be close at hand. We will comb the mountain pass and beyond.
hdb7c4266gd420g4cd6g8508gf485456715fa: Our people know a cure? Where can we find this crèche?
h7433fc33g5d75g4b16gace1gb430d4c1656d: It must be at hand - the kith'rak had come seeking it.
h2b6767aag8f78g4360g9afdga21ad6c1b809: We will comb the mountain pass, and beyond.
h9ecfcd8ag4eabg4862g8d3eg4fc615722da3: Explain what just happened. The kith'rak called for your head.
h472d0685g6774g440aga903g641c50c5d2ba: What just happened? Your own kind wanted your blood.
he5c3d318ga4e9g4126g9c4bgb8d637b14e36: The kith'rak is a traitor. He would deny the Queen's protocol and slay his own children.
h05cdd40cgfef1g49ceg9d50ga064886f3c11: He says death is the only path to purification. I know this to be a lie. My cure - our cure - awaits us at a crèche.
h47545d72g2287g40dcgb0c7g01f8ff4e4474: I might have learned more had your mouth remained closed.
h612a0f3cgc1d0g4faag86d1g559f6f61789e: He is a kith'rak - a githyanki knight. He is also a traitor. He denies the Queen's protocol and calls for my head.
h0f96bfcfgf1c7g47f7gbe64gb7b0537b434e: The box suddenly seems to weigh heavily on you. Quickly turn to other matters.
h754ebda7g06d3g44cdg8798g24eee4357ce3: Show her the strange object. I believe this is the weapon the kith'rak seeks.
hf1e95e28g683dg48cag978dg4b366f83978f: Show her the strange object. I believe this is the weapon the rider seeks.
hd9116c19g8b20g43b5g9502ga2c8f6f5a467: Gith runes. Yes - this must be it.
hb66a4948g7061g478egacddg2b675e559d2d: You will relinquish this weapon to the varsh - the caretaker - when we reach the crèche.
h8472ddaeg23cfg42d6ga21cg181757b412c8: Consider it the price for your purification.
h4b272acagf4bag4ef2g9a53g9452c6be3a36: The rider mentioned a weapon. What do you know of it?
h2f6cec38g505cg400eg816ag285ab26275b3: It is a polyhedric device marked with gith runes, if the kith'rak is to be believed.
h74d28dc2g9cf9g4794ga24fg821d8991d8e6: I know nothing more. No gith text describes such a weapon. I am not certain it even exists.
h61e9c623g632eg4dc1g9043g8966707e029b: You do not have the authority. Defer to your leader.
h869405cbg459cg443ag9308g321dc04c6667: You are full up. Dismiss your weakest warrior.
hab97a6c3g38a7g4f50g8f2fga40b3eecf8c2: Go to my camp. We can speak there.
ha7ad64d1g05d5g4a82ga937g615f1d518a59: Very well. But heed my words.
h259add32g0beag4fc8gb3c8gc463ffaa9eb8: A crèche is near - we must seek signs of it. Only there can we be purified.
h7eb6b532g3705g46c9g9adagbf426dadb6a6: Search these corpses for a map, and beware the skies. We are watched.
hd77ae06bg14e2g4d5fg9e41g827f4481b6c9: I will await word at your camp.
h5cf83d0ega4ebg482bgac93gba7f2d572ab9: I will await word at your camp. And beware the skies. We are watched.
h5bb3e0c4g4386g42b0gae8fgf1203ded01ea: A sensible choice. Our alliance has proven beneficial to us both.
h5c524d91g09f2g4872ga2fdg35952b226020: You have made an ally from Crèche K'liir - few know such fortune. Call me Lae'zel.
hee08816dg8a27g479bg8292g4c2b1b5e80ce: Fool. No point in showing the beast kindness - it'll still bite you in the end.
hd0080618g4d3cg446aga24cg79ca9e734fed: You've a sharp tongue, elf. Would that your mind proved its equal.
hc15980b2gdfa5g4efdg9b1dgeb52492c3613: Half-elf. I suppose the finer details are lost on a creature like you.
hdf4fb4f2g91ccg45f2g820eg28fdf41095fa: A githyanki crèche must be near; its caretaker has the means to cleanse us.
h3db212a1gc6a3g4fc9ga687g8bd72b334cce: Search these corpses for a map. And beware the skies. We are watched.
h3a5c361fg1b6cg4655ga9a1gc03e471e37ad: Forward, through the pass. And beware the skies. We are watched.

h5f541b65g48b1g4cf4g9ca2gbda557d6b713: And beware the skies. We are watched.

h0573ffd8gd0c3g4accg821cg40d07e777c0f: A crèche is near - we must seek signs of it. Forward, through the pass.
hda224ddeg70b9g4364g923fge2914e35da48: I am pursuing other means to a cure. I don't need whatever you're offering.
h1adb4abcgd3b4g4befg8f58g9f76793a2b4a: Githyanki teaching is as infallible as Queen Vlaakith herself. To remove a tadpole, there are but two paths: purification at a crèche - or beheading.
h2dda7379gdc0fg44b5ga942g44c4bcc2861e: Any other 'cure' might be offered is a lie. Cast it from your mind.
hd70612f1gbcf2g49bagb795g91442ff90636: An abomination grows within you, yet you would refuse purification?
h28599440g7327g40a3ga82cg63100187f9f8: Yet even a feared sarth could not break you in battle. Yes - you may be of considerable use.
h01c4001dgdb14g4ebbga247g0646645ba65f: *The ensuing silence is deafening. You don't know what to make of it.*
h01946574gd760g4146gb702gd31172f00c11: You survived longer than I expected without me to aid you.
h78a293e2g7111g4006gac7agc9dfc5f4c471: You survived longer than I expected. I cannot say the same for the tieflings you abandoned me with.
h1fbdcb9agb206g48bag8844gc255c83c2b73: I remember. You were on the gh'ath. The nautiloid. You carry a tadpole.

h9dd892e2g940eg4f65g8635g58bab3d7dc29: I might know even more had you not so rashly intruded.
ha015df3egfc41g4e2fga368g6f522252645b: Shka'keth! I should have your head for interfering with protocol.
